---
title: "Lorenzo Fabbri — CV"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: article
    css: assets/styles.css
    theme: none
    grid:
      body-width: 800px
---

::: {.cv-header}
*Postdoctoral Researcher in Epidemiology · Madrid, Spain*

[lorenzo.fabbri92sm@gmail.com](mailto:lorenzo.fabbri92sm@gmail.com) | [website](https://lorenzofabbri.github.io/epilorenzo) | [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-3031-322X) | [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=QbPv1H0AAAAJ) | [GitHub](https://github.com/lorenzoFabbri) | [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/lorenzo-fabbri-303185383) | [Bluesky](https://bsky.app/profile/epilorenzo.bsky.social)
:::

This page links to four variants of my CV. Pick the one that fits the role and language you need.

## Academic CV

For research / faculty / postdoc applications.

- English — [HTML](cv-academic.html) · [PDF](cv-academic.pdf) · [DOCX](cv-academic.docx)
- Español — [HTML](cv-academic-es.html) · [PDF](cv-academic-es.pdf) · [DOCX](cv-academic-es.docx)

## Industry CV

For data science / quantitative / applied-research roles in industry.

- English — [HTML](cv-industry.html) · [PDF](cv-industry.pdf) · [DOCX](cv-industry.docx)
- Español — [HTML](cv-industry-es.html) · [PDF](cv-industry-es.pdf) · [DOCX](cv-industry-es.docx)

::: {.cv-updated}
Last updated: `r format(Sys.Date(), "%B %Y")`
:::
